concept: Marriage—where 'What's for dinner?' is a nightly battleground.
title: Funny Marriage Quote Shirt - Nightly Dinner Debate Humor for Couples
description:
Let’s face it, marriage is less about romance and more about figuring out what to eat every single night. If you’ve ever found yourself debating between tacos or pasta like it’s the most important decision of your life, this design is for you. Perfect for those who know that true love means arguing over takeout menus and still managing to laugh about it. 

Perfect for: 
- Newlyweds learning about each other’s questionable food choices 
- Spouses who have the 'What do you want for dinner?' conversation on repeat 
- Any couple who knows that love is about compromise, except when it comes to pizza toppings

DETAILS: This design features bold, playful typography that reads 'Marriage: Where 'What's for dinner?' is a nightly battleground' in a fun and modern font. Crafted with care for any married duo, it comes in a full range of colors and sizes to suit every kitchen warrior. Made to order.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
